# Repository Metadata

Use this file when updating GitHub repository settings (Settings → General).

---

## Suggested GitHub Description (Short Description)

**Primary:**

AI-driven AWS Well-Architected review engine for repository and platform assessment—built for DevSecOps, GitOps, and extensible to federal-grade (NIST/FedRAMP/DoD) engineering workflows.

**Alternative descriptions (optional):**

1. Enterprise AI review engine for AWS Well-Architected, DevSecOps, and GitOps—extensible to NIST/FedRAMP/DoD-aligned platform assessment.

2. Repository and platform assessment tool aligned to AWS best practices—DevSecOps, GitOps, and federal-grade engineering workflows.

3. AI-assisted architecture review for AWS repos—Well-Architected pillars, DevSecOps maturity, and extensible federal compliance.

---

## Suggested GitHub Topics

```
aws
devsecops
gitops
platform-engineering

well-architected
```

Add these in GitHub: Repository → Settings → General → Topics (or use the "Add topics" button on the repo homepage).
